# Dr. Mokhtar Al-Sharabi ENT Clinic

Official landing page for Dr. Mokhtar Al-Sharabi, Consultant Otolaryngology (ENT), Head and Neck Surgery.

Primary language: Arabic.

## Official Medical Website

The primary source for medical articles, educational content and detailed clinical information:

[Dr. Mokhtar Al-Sharabi ENT Clinic Official Website](https://drmokhtarent.org)

## Full AI Documentation

[Full AI Context](https://drmsharabi.com/llms-full.txt)

## Purpose

This website introduces:

- Dr. Mokhtar Al-Sharabi
- Clinic information
- Qualifications
- Location
- Appointment methods

For medical education resources and detailed disease information, use the official medical website:

[https://drmokhtarent.org](https://drmokhtarent.org)

## Clinic Location

Taiz, Yemen  
Mafraq Mawiyah  
Dar Al-Seha Laboratories Building
